notableEvents.label: Mookie Betts GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Freddie Freeman out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sung-Mun Song pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sung-Mun Song pops out to pitcher Brock Stewart.
